hotel_name: InterContinental Ras Al Khaimah Mina Al Arab Resort & Spa by IHG
raw_description:
Prime Beachfront Location:InterContinental Ras Al Khaimah Mina Al Arab Resort & Spa by IHG in Ras al Khaimah offers a private beach area and beachfront access. Guests enjoy an infinity swimming pool, sun terrace, and free WiFi throughout the resort.Comfortable Accommodations:Rooms feature sea views, balconies, and modern amenities such as air-conditioning, TV, and private bathrooms. Family rooms and ground-floor units cater to all travellers, ensuring a comfortable stay.Dining Experience:The resort offers a variety of dining options, including a family-friendly restaurant serving American, Mediterranean, and Middle Eastern cuisines. Additional facilities include a bar, pool bar, and coffee shop.Leisure Activities:Guests can enjoy yoga classes, fitness classes, and cycling tours. The resort also provides a kids' club, indoor and outdoor play areas, and a tennis court, ensuring entertainment for all ages.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.3for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at InterContinental Ras Al Khaimah Mina Al Arab Resort & Spa by IHG. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including 3 swimming pools, Beachfront, Free WiFi.
